components.name: AccordionComponent

@for (item of items(); track item.id) {
@if (isOpen(item.id)) {

}
}

components.name: AppComponent
BreadcrumbComponent
components.templateData:
@for (item of items(); track item.label; let last = $last) {
  1. @if (!last && !item.disabled) { } @else { {{ item.label }} } @if (!last) { {{ separator() }} }
    2. }

components.name: EmptyStateComponent

inputsClass.name: description
inputsClass.defaultValue: 'Tente ajustar os filtros ou criar um novo item.'

components.templateData:
{{ icon() }}

{{ title() }}

{{ description() }}

@if (buttonLabel()) { }

components.name: TabsComponent
components.templateData:
@for (tab of tabs(); track tab.id) { }
@for (tab of tabs(); track tab.id) { @if (isActive(tab)) {

{{ tab.content }}

} }

components.name: ToastComponent
TooltipComponent
UiAlertComponent
components.templateData:
{{ icon }}

{{ message }}

components.name: UiButtonComponent

propertiesClass.name: buttonClasses
propertiesClass.defaultValue:
computed(() =>
    [
      'ui-button',
      `ui-button--${this.color()}`,
      `ui-button--${this.size()}`,
      this.outline() ? 'ui-button--outline' : '',
      this.fullWidth() ? 'ui-button--full' : '',
      this.rounded() ? 'ui-button--rounded' : '',
      this.disabled() ? 'ui-button--disabled' : '',
      this.customClass(),
    ]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join(' '),
  )

components.name: UiCardComponent
components.templateData:
{{ title }}

{{ subtitle }}

{{ description }}

{{ footer }}

components.name: UiLoadingComponent
components.templateData:
@if (type() === "spinner") {
} @if (type() === "dots") {
} @if (type() === "skeleton-text") {
} @if (type() === "skeleton-card") {
} @if (type() === "skeleton-table") {
@for (row of [1, 2, 3, 4]; track row) { }
} @if (type() === "skeleton-avatar") {
} @if (message()) {

{{ message() }}

}
